exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your bankruptcy recovery forward
items: Gather and organize all financial documents including bank statements, tax returns, pay stubs, and debt records from the past 6 months
Calculate your current net worth by listing all assets (cash, property, investments) and all debts (credit cards, loans, mortgages)
Create a detailed monthly budget tracking all income sources and categorizing every expense to identify areas for cost reduction
Review your credit reports from all three bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion) and dispute any inaccurate information
Research and compare secured credit cards to begin rebuilding your credit history with a small deposit and responsible usage
Establish an emergency fund by setting aside $25-50 per month in a separate savings account, even while paying off debts
